awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: 😎 A curated list of awesome EOSIO resources for users and developers.
awesomeListMeta.description: :sunglasses: A curated list of awesome EOSIO resources for users and developers.

nodes.itemHTML: • Wax Cloud Wallet

• Wax Testnet - Wax's official Testnet.
    • Account Creation and Faucet - Wax Sweden's testnet page.
• eosdac/ual-waxstars12 - UAL authenticator for Wax Cloud Wallet.
• EOSIO Blockchain Developer Workshop - Free course on YouTube.
• EOSIO/history-toolsstars64 - Official EOSIO history API plugin.
• Hyperion History APIstars116 - Scalable Full History API Solution for EOSIO based blockchains.
• EOSIO Light APIstars49 - Historic information about EOSIO blockchain accounts and token balances.
• EOSIO/eosio.contracts - Official C++ system contract test suite (notoriously difficult to use).
• Hydra - JavaScript framework for testing EOSIO smart contracts.
• haderech/vertstars6 - JavaScript EOS-VM emulation RunTime for WASM-based blockchain contracts. Run and test smart contracts.
• Liquid Apps - Smart contract services vRAM, oracles, cron, IPFS and ICB.
• DelphiOraclestars38 - A multi-party source of truth, designed to provide the near-realtime price of the asset pairs to other smart contracts or to external users.
• Blancstars18 - A toolchain for building WebAssembly-based blockchain contracts. Currently, Blanc supports EOSIO and CosmWasm (experimental).
• manh-vv/eosjs-namestars9 - Convert an Eosio name to uint64 and back.
• blockchain-etl/eos-etlstars9 - Connector for Google's BigQuery Public Datasets.
• EOSIO Ecosystemstars3 - EOSIO multi-chain ecosystem information.
• kesar/decentwitterstars36 - Decentralized Twitter on EOS.
• gofractally - Eden team repository with new Mandel resources and tools.
• SwiftyEOSstars95 - Framework for interacting with EOS, written in Swift.
• Demuxstars304 - Demux is a backend infrastructure pattern for sourcing blockchain events to deterministically update queryable datastores and trigger side effects.
• Introducing Demux — Deterministic Databases Off-Chain Verified by the EOSIO Blockchain - Article.
• WAX Random Number Generator
• maxifom/eos-abigenstars4 - Typescript and Golang code generator for generating type-safe client and tables for EOS-compatible contracts.
• eosdetroit/nodesuitestars14 - Nodesuite is a tool to simplify the management and configuration of eosio nodes through the use of Ansible playbooks.
• clsdk - EOSIO smart contract C++ testing framework including in-contract debugging during wasm execution with VS code.

• The EOSIO Testnet - Block.one's official EOSIO Testnet. Test on fully-featured EOSIO stable releases.

• CryptoKylin Testnet - CryptoKylin Testnet is a developer-friendly testnet maintained by a group of EOS Mainnet Block Producers.
